hooks.text: You think there is one way your money gets to China. There are three, and your bank put you on the slowest one without asking.
Your money can take three different roads to reach a Chinese supplier. Two of them you have probably never heard of, and one lands same day.
One of these payment roads moved twenty-four trillion dollars last year and grew forty percent. Most business owners do not know it exists or that they can use it.
Two business owners pay the same supplier the same day. One waits five days through banks in the middle. The other lands it by lunch. Only one knew there was a faster road.
Every time you pay a Chinese supplier, you may be stuck on the slow three-to-five-day road, losing days and fees, while a same-day road sits right there unused.
